market: The KOSPI remains volatile on Monday morning, March 30, 2026. Global markets are cautious as traders rebalance ahead of the quarter-end. Samsung and SK Hynix face pressure from 'TurboQuant' AI concerns, while defense and energy stocks remain key areas of interest.
art: Attention is turning to the Art OnO 2026 fair starting at SETEC on April 3. The market shows a flight to quality, with collectors prioritizing established mid-career artists and tactile works over speculative digital trends.
